ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. There being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiffs are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiffs are sanctioned $400.00 each for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L.
